name: payment-confirmed
title: Payment Confirmed
author: mcpcn
description: Payment confirmation card with product image, price, delivery info, and tracking button. Supports default and compressed variants.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with product image and tracking button
changelog.1.0.3: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.2.0.0: Added compressed variant, merged payment-success into this component
changelog.2.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.2.0.2: Fixed missing alt fallback on product image in compressed desktop variant
changelog.2.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
